title: Utkanteshwar Mahadev
tagline: Utkanteshwar Mahadev — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: Utkantheshwar Mahadev or Utkaṇṭheśvara Mahādeva is a Shiva Temple in the Kapadvanj Taluka, Kheda district of Gujarat, India.
overview.description: Utkantheshwar Mahadev or Utkaṇṭheśvara Mahādeva is a Shiva Temple in the Kapadvanj Taluka, Kheda district of Gujarat, India. and is located on the bank of Vatrak river. The temple is described by Ali Muhammad Khan in the 18th century Persian text, Mirat-i-Ahmadi.

topPlaces.name: Telnar
topPlaces.description: Telnar or Telnal is a village in Kapadvanj Taluka in Kheda district of Gujarat state, India.

topPlaces.name: Antroli
topPlaces.description: Antroli is a mid-size village in the Kapadvanj Taluka of the Kheda district in central Gujarat Its current population is about 8500 people.

topPlaces.name: Kapadvanj
topPlaces.description: Kapadvanj (Karpat – Vanjiyam or "The Land of Textile") is a town as well as one of the Taluka of the Kheda district in the Gujarat, India. It is located on bank of river Mohar.

items.note: Telnar or Telnal is a village in Kapadvanj Taluka in Kheda district of Gujarat state, India.
Antroli is a mid-size village in the Kapadvanj Taluka of the Kheda district in central Gujarat Its current population is about 8500 people.
Kapadvanj (Karpat – Vanjiyam or "The Land of Textile") is a town as well as one of the Taluka of the Kheda district in the Gujarat, India. It is located on bank of river Mohar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Utkanteshwar Mahadev?
faq.a: The best time to visit Utkanteshwar Mahadev is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Utkanteshwar Mahadev?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport, Ahmedabad (41 km) and the nearest railway station is Ahmedabad Junction (44 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Utkanteshwar Mahadev?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Utkanteshwar Mahadev at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Utkanteshwar Mahadev?
faq.a: Stays in Utkanteshwar Mahadev start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Utkanteshwar Mahadev?
faq.a: The top attractions are Telnar, Antroli, Kapadvanj.
